text:
This is the failure message from Poudriere:

===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for ghc-7.10.2
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ghc/work/stage/usr/local/bin/haddock-ghc-7.10.2: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/ghc
====>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for ghc-7.10.2

In my opinion haddock should be built even when DOCS is unset.
